samples.xml_description:
<module id="signal_generator">
    <description>Triangle Wave signal generator.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <output id="wave" width_description="[4:0]">Output wave signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state value="0">Initial state.</state>
        <state value="1">Reverse state.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[4:0]" from="0" to="wave">5-bit waveform register.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[0:0]" from="0" to="state">State register.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
    <!--  -->
    <!--  -->
    </implementation>
</module>
